name: Relaxation Blend
description: A finely ground blend of calming kelp harvested from tranquil reef gardens.

effect.name: Relaxation
effect.description: Gain advantage on your next saving throw against being Frightened or Charmed.

flavor: Light mint with a clean ocean finish.

name: Sleep Blend
description: A soothing blend prepared for peaceful evenings.

effect.name: Restful Sleep
effect.description: The next Long Rest removes one additional level of Exhaustion and grants pleasant dreams.

flavor: Chamomile, sea mint, and sweet kelp.

name: Festival Blend
description: A colorful recreational blend commonly enjoyed during Atlantean festivals.

effect.name: Festival Spirit
effect.description: Gain advantage on Performance and Charisma (Persuasion) checks.

flavor: Sweet reef berries with citrus kelp.

name: Medicinal Blend
description: Prepared by experienced herbalists using restorative kelp and reef herbs.
flavor: Earthy with a slightly salty finish.

name: Premium Reef Blend
description: Zarik's signature blend combining the finest kelps harvested across the Deep Realm.

effect.name: Premium Blend
effect.description: Choose one effect from any standard Kelp Blend when consumed.

flavor: Complex floral aroma with rich ocean herbs.

name: Dr. Kelp (6-Pack)
description: Atlantis' most famous carbonated kelp beverage.
flavor: Sweet vanilla kelp with ocean spice.

name: Diet Dr. Kelp (6-Pack)
description: The sugar-free version of Atlantis' favorite drink.

effect.name: Refreshing
effect.description: Ignore one level of fatigue from forced marching for the next hour.

flavor: Lighter vanilla with crisp reef citrus.

effect.name: Calm Focus
effect.description: Gain advantage on your next Wisdom saving throw.

effect.name: Tidewalker
effect.description: Increase your swimming speed by 10 feet.

effect.name: Leviathan's Strength
effect.description: Gain advantage on Strength checks and Strength saving throws.

effect.name: Dreamwalker
effect.description: Gain advantage on Insight checks and Wisdom (Perception) checks.
